name: Shrimp in A'warm Remoulade'
recipeIngredient: 1 pound medium shrimp, peeled, with tails on, deveined
4 cups cooked and drained angel hair pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the Rustic Rub in a bowl; mix well. Store leftovers in an airtight container for up to three months.
2. Rub shrimp with 2 tablespoons of the rustic spice rub.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Saute the shrimp for 3-4 minutes.
4. Add 1/4 cup of white wine and cook for 1 more minute.
5. In a food processor, combine all ingredients for the Remoulade Sauce and process for 30 seconds.
6. After sauting the shrimp for about 4-5 minutes with the spice rub and wine, add 1 cup of the remoulade sauce from the processor and simmer for about 2 minutes.
7. Add chopped green onions to finish cooking.
8. Spoon the shrimp and sauce over the cooked angel hair pasta and serve.
